## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No real backup data, contacts, messages, media, account identifiers, serials, or keys are committed.
- [ ] Parser fixtures are synthetic or anonymized.
- [ ] New device/backup flows are local-first and do not upload data.
